ESP32-C3 Super Mini Development Board, ESP32 WiFi Bluetooth

£12.99

The ESP32-C3 super Mini Development Board is a compact and powerful solution for your Internet of Things (IoT) projects. This board features the ESP32-C3 chip, which combines a 32-bit RISC-V single-core processor with Wi-Fi and Bluetooth connectivity. With its small footprint and low power consumption, this board is ideal for space-constrained applications.

← Back to Shop

The ESP32-C3 super Mini Development Board is a compact and powerful solution for your Internet of Things (IoT) projects. This board features the ESP32-C3 chip, which combines a 32-bit RISC-V single-core processor with Wi-Fi and Bluetooth connectivity. With its small footprint and low power consumption, this board is ideal for space-constrained applications. It supports a wide range of peripherals, including I2C, SPI, UART, and GPIO, making it versatile for various projects. Whether you’re building a smart home device, a wearable gadget, or an industrial automation system, the ESP32-C3 super Mini Development Board provides a robust and efficient platform for your development needs. Unleash your creativity and bring your ideas to life with this cutting-edge board.

DhivanSTech

  • DhivanSTech

    DhivanSTech (DST) is an electronics brand supplying tested DIY maker components and test equipment via Amazon. We also document real builds, experiments, and engineering projects.
